name: yantra-starter-kit
description: Blazing-fast, lightweight, native development environment for the Yantra toolkit.

scripts.dev: concurrently "cd frontend && npm run dev" "cd backend && uvicorn frameworks.fastapi.main:app --port 8000 --reload" "cd ai-ml-ds/api && uvicorn app:app --port 8001 --reload"
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install
